title: Indulgent Ukrainian Chicken Stir-fry
description: A garlicky, caramelized chicken stir-fry with a sweet-salty sauce, double-fried for crunch, served on a hot tava griddle.
instructions: Slice chicken into thin strips about 1 cm wide.
Mix garlic, ginger, soy sauce, honey, and apple cider vinegar in a bowl.
Marinate chicken in the sauce for 15 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in the tava over medium-high heat and sear the chicken until browned, about 4 minutes.
Transfer the seared chicken to a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil to the tava and re-fry the chicken at high heat until crisp, about 2 minutes.
Pour the remaining sauce into the tava, bring to a gentle simmer, then return the chicken and stir until the sauce thickens, about 3 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the dish and serve immediately hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
